content: Phase 1: Setup database connection to Supabase PostgreSQL
Phase 1: Create database tables/migrations + seed data (9 users + settings)
Phase 1: Implement JWT auth (login, protected routes, RBAC)
Phase 1: Core endpoints (dumas CRUD, tindak_lanjut, approval workflow, notifications)
Phase 1: POC test script - test all core flows
Phase 1: Fix POC until all tests pass
Phase 2: Design Agent + Full App Development
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
